title: Global Infrastructure
description: Public network overview with current reach, utilization, and service health derived from sanitized telemetry.

widget.title: Network Widget
widget.description: Sanitized live network proof for partner embeds, sales pages, and trust surfaces.
widget.error: The widget couldn't load the public network snapshot.

dpi.title: DPI Resistance Score
dpi.description: A careful public surface for restrictive-network resilience. This page only publishes a score when there is enough fresh probe signal to support it.
dpi.error: The DPI resistance contract is currently unavailable.
dpi.enabledState: Fresh enough probe coverage is available, so country-level DPI score output can be published.
dpi.disabledState: Public DPI scoring remains gated until enough real probe signal exists across recent measurement windows.

reasonCodes.public_dpi_probe_pipeline_not_enabled: The public DPI pipeline is wired, but probe publication is not active yet.
reasonCodes.public_dpi_probe_dimensions_insufficient: Real probes are flowing, but the signal dimensions are still too narrow for a publishable public score.
reasonCodes.public_dpi_probe_targets_unavailable: Probe targets are currently unavailable for a trustworthy country-level snapshot.
reasonCodes.public_dpi_probe_source_unavailable: Probe collection is temporarily degraded, so the public DPI surface remains gated.
reasonCodes.public_network_regions_unavailable: Regional network data is temporarily unavailable for the DPI surface.

methodology.title: What the public score must eventually reflect

items.connection: Connection success rate under restrictive conditions.
items.handshake: Median handshake latency for supported protocols.
items.baseline: HTTPS/SNI application baseline where TLS-capable surfaces exist.
items.survival: Session survival and reconnect stability after establishment.
items.freshness: Freshness, sample count, and directional confidence before publication.

guardrails.title: What this page will not fake

items.noMagic: No decorative public score without enough real probes.
items.noInternals: No anti-blocking internals, probe identities, or sensitive topology.
items.directional: Any published score is directional evidence, not a guarantee.
items.conditionsChange: Restrictive-country conditions can change quickly and confidence must reflect that.
